title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And they all look super depressed!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is that ship gonna be alright!?

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: But that ship's gonna get away them!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Hey, who d'ya think you're orderin' around!?

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Hey, don't just do whatever you want!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: It's too late! We're gonna be swallowed!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Whew... Things calmed down at last...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hey Nico Robin, can you see something?

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Sorry, I'll be more careful next time.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh you will? Well then that's good.

summary: Foxy challenges Luffy to a pirate game where crew members can be stolen, turning the island stop into a dangerous contest.
